name: evolve-anything
description: Self-evolving Claude Code plugin: autonomous skill/rule optimization, correction feedback loops, direct-patch tuning, and cross-project fleet observability.

plugins.name: evolve-anything
plugins.description: Automatic skill/rule optimization using direct LLM patches with fitness evaluation and human approval workflow

slow_threshold_ms.title: Slow Threshold (ms)
slow_threshold_ms.description: Bash commands slower than this (ms) are logged to tool_durations.jsonl (default: 1000)

subagent_warning_threshold.title: Subagent Warning Threshold
subagent_warning_threshold.description: Warn when the number of subagents spawned within the recent time window (subagent_window_minutes) reaches this value (default: 5). Measured over a window, not cumulatively.

subagent_window_minutes.title: Subagent Window (minutes)
subagent_window_minutes.description: Time window (minutes) over which subagent spawns are counted for the warning threshold (default: 5).

ctx_warn_percent.title: Context Window Warning (%)
ctx_warn_percent.description: Warn when latest message's context occupancy exceeds this percent of the model window (default: 20). Set to 0 to disable.

ctx_window_tokens.title: Context Window Size (tokens)
ctx_window_tokens.description: Model context window in tokens used by ctx_guard (default: 1000000 for Opus 1M).
